name: @platform/worker-runtime
description: Background worker runtime: job queue consumption, retry policy, concurrency control, and worker lifecycle management.

readme.summary: DEPRECATED (ADR-0006 / ADR-ACT-0288): superseded by apps/platform-api server/worker-registry.ts + usecases/webhook-worker.ts; do not add new usage; removal review 2026-12-18. Background worker runtime: job queue consumption, retry policy, concurrency control, and worker lifecycle management.
responsibilities: Own the background worker process lifecycle (start, drain, shutdown)
Register and dispatch job processors by queue name
Apply retry, backoff, and dead-letter policy per job type
Emit observability signals and audit events for job execution
nonResponsibilities: Does not define domain logic executed inside jobs
Does not own queue topology or broker configuration (queue-runtime)
Does not interact with HTTP request/response cycle
usage: Do not add new consumers — this package is deprecated (ADR-0006), retained only until its removal review 2026-12-18.
operationalNotes: Graceful shutdown drains in-flight jobs before exiting
Dead-letter queues require monitoring alerts wired via observability package
